🚨 High Invoice / Fraud Alert

A high-value financial transaction has been detected by the AI-Powered Enterprise Financial Risk Monitoring System.

📄 Invoice Details

Invoice ID {{$json["Invoice_ID"]}}
Vendor Name {{$json["Vendor_Name"]}}
Invoice Amount ₹ {{$json["Amount"]}}
Department {{$json["Department"]}}

parameters.subject: Financial Risk Alert
parameters.message:
=

🚨 Financial Risk Alert

The AI-Powered Enterprise Financial Monitoring System detected a high financial risk condition because company liabilities are greater than assets.

📊 Financial Risk Summary

Company ID {{$json["Company_ID"]}}
Vendor Name {{$json["Vendor_Name"]}}
Assets ₹ {{$json["Assets"]}}
Liabilities ₹ {{$json["Liabilities"]}}
Risk Status {{$json["Risk_Status"]}}

⚠ Recommended Action

  • Review company’s debt burden
  • Check repayment capacity
  • Evaluate financial stability before approval
  • Escalate to finance head for review

This alert was generated automatically using the n8n AI Financial Automation Workflow.

parameters.subject: Operational Inefficiency Alert
parameters.message:
=

⚠ Operational Inefficiency Alert

The AI-Powered Enterprise Financial Monitoring System detected low operational efficiency because the EBITDA margin is below the acceptable threshold of 15%.

📊 Operational Performance Summary

Company ID {{$json["Company_ID"]}}
Vendor Name {{$json["Vendor_Name"]}}
Revenue ₹ {{$json["Revenue"]}}
EBITDA ₹ {{$json["EBITDA"]}}
EBITDA Margin {{ (($json["EBITDA"] / $json["Revenue"]) * 100).toFixed(2) }}%
Risk Status {{$json["Risk_Status"]}}

⚠ Recommended Action

  • Review operational cost structure
  • Analyze profitability and margin pressure
  • Identify areas for cost optimization
  • Escalate for operational efficiency review

This alert was generated automatically using the n8n AI Financial Automation Workflow.

✅ Low Risk / Auto Approved

The AI-Powered Enterprise Financial Monitoring System analyzed the transaction and classified it as LOW RISK.

📄 Invoice Summary

Invoice ID {{$json["Invoice_ID"]}}
Vendor Name {{$json["Vendor_Name"]}}
Invoice Amount ₹ {{$json["Amount"]}}
Department {{$json["Department"]}}
Risk Status {{$json["Risk_Flag"]}}
Approval Level {{$json["Approval_Level"]}}
Duplicate Check {{$json["Duplicate_Check"]}}

✅ System Decision

  • Invoice classified as low financial risk
  • No high-value invoice risk detected
  • No liability-based financial risk detected
  • EBITDA margin is within acceptable range
  • Eligible for auto approval workflow
  • No escalation required

This approval was generated automatically using the n8n AI Financial Automation Workflow.
